name: Dark Star Vertical
desc: Stack Dark Star for Black Hole scaling. Jhin 5-cost carry with massive range and OHKO potential.
godWhy: +4% 5-cost odds makes hitting Jhin much faster on 8
gameplan: Open Dark Star 2 with Cho+Liss. Stabilize with Kai'Sa 2-star on 4-1. Roll 7-8 for Karma + Jhin. Cap 9 for max Dark Star.

1.label: Stage 1 — Economy
1.tip: Open with Cho + Lissandra for Dark Star 2. Both are 1-cost so easy to find. Win streak to build gold. Do not roll.

2.label: Stage 2 — Win Streak
2.tip: Add Kai'Sa when you find her. Push Dark Star 3 if you hit Karma. Keep econ 50g. Do NOT spend on rolling yet.

3.label: Stage 3 — Stabilize
3.tip: Hit level 6. Find Karma 2-star if possible. Spend gold ONLY if health is below 50. Otherwise stay at 50g interest.

4.label: Stage 4 — Level 8 Push
4.tip: Level to 8 on 4-1. Roll for Karma + Jhin. Once you have Jhin 1-star, equip items and stabilize. Look for Maokai flex.

5.label: Stage 5 — Cap & Win
5.tip: Level to 9 for Dark Star 6. Slow roll for Jhin 2-star. Add Bard as final flex for Meeple + Channeler utility.

name: N.O.V.A. Bastion
desc: Bastion frontline tanks everything while Kindred and Akali deal sustained damage from protected positions.
godWhy: Radiant item on Kindred or Aatrox frontline is game-ending
gameplan: Aatrox+Poppy Bastion 2 early. Add Caitlyn for N.O.V.A. 2. Roll 7 for Maokai + Kindred. Cap Bastion 4 with Jax/Ornn.

1.label: Stage 1 — Open Bastion
1.tip: Aatrox + Poppy opens Bastion 2 immediately. Strong early board. Win or stay close to win streak.

2.label: Stage 2 — Add N.O.V.A.
2.tip: Find Caitlyn for N.O.V.A. 2 (Aatrox already has it). Add Akali as third N.O.V.A. if you hit her. Keep 50g.

3.label: Stage 3 — Flex Your Board
3.tip: Level to 6. Add Maokai for Brawler flex. You have N.O.V.A. 3 + Bastion 2 + Brawler. Strong mid-game.

4.label: Stage 4 — Find Kindred
4.tip: Level 7 and roll for Kindred. Equip items as soon as found. N.O.V.A. 4 + Bastion 2 + Challenger is solid.

5.label: Stage 5 — Max Bastion
5.tip: Level 8-9. Add Jax + Ornn for Bastion 4. Shen 5-cost Bastion cap. Replace Caitlyn if Bastion count is enough.

name: Anima Reroll
desc: Anima Squad grows stronger every round they survive. Aurora 2-star is the AP core carry.
godWhy: Lose streak builds gold — roll for 2-stars at level 6. HP loss minimized.
gameplan: Open Briar + Jinx Anima 2. Lose streak stages 1-3 to build gold. Hit level 6 and slow-roll for Aurora + Illaoi 2-stars. Add Fiora at 8.

1.label: Stage 1 — Lose Streak
1.tip: Intentionally lose with a weak board. Keep Briar + Jinx for Anima 2. Every loss is gold (interest + lose streak bonus).

2.label: Stage 2 — Keep Losing (Save Gold)
2.tip: Add Aurora as a unit but do NOT 2-star her yet. Stay below 50 HP is risky but aim for 50g+ gold. Evelynn god helps.

3.label: Stage 3 — Stabilize or Die
3.tip: Add Illaoi for Anima 3. By 3-1 you need to stabilize. Slow roll at level 6 to hit Aurora + Illaoi 2-star.

4.label: Stage 4 — Anima 6 + 2-Stars
4.tip: Level 6 slow roll until Aurora 2-star stabilized. Add Poppy + Aatrox for Bastion + Anima 5. Equip Aurora items.

5.label: Stage 5 — Cap with Fiora
5.tip: Level 8. Add Fiora for Anima 6. Fiora is a natural 5-cost cap. Anima Squad keeps stacking HP every fight.

name: Channeler AP
desc: Channeler mana engine fires endlessly. Aurelion Sol nukes the entire enemy board.
godWhy: Anomaly item scales perfectly with AP carries — giant power spike
gameplan: Zoe + Viktor open Channeler 2. Level 7 for Aurelion Sol. Bard at 8. Sona at 9 for Channeler 5 + Psionic cap.

1.label: Stage 1 — Channeler 2
1.tip: Zoe + Viktor immediately gives Channeler 2. Both are cheap (2g/3g). Zoe also gives Arbiter 2 with Leona. Stay econ.

2.label: Stage 2 — Add Psionic
2.tip: Add Gragas + Pyke for Psionic 2. Your board is Channeler 2 + Psionic 2 + Voyager. Decent midgame core.

3.label: Stage 3 — Level 5-6
3.tip: Add Master Yi at level 5. Psionic 3 + Channeler 2 + Marauder. Keep econ 50g+. Get AP items for Viktor.

4.label: Stage 4 — Aurelion Sol Online
4.tip: Level 7 and find Aurelion Sol. Equip Blue Buff immediately. Channeler 3-4 with Bard. This is your power spike.

5.label: Stage 5 — Full Channel
5.tip: Level 9. Sona 5-cost for Channeler 5 + Psionic + Commander. Aurelion Sol deletes boards.

name: Rogue Assassin
desc: Rogues jump to the enemy backline. Riven 2-star is a bruiser-carry that deletes supports and carries.
godWhy: Lose streak gives gold to find Riven 2-star on 3-2/3-5 rolldown
gameplan: Briar + Talon Rogue 2 opener. Lose streak to 3-1, then slow roll level 6 for Riven 2 + Gwen 2. Cap with Kai'Sa at 8.

1.label: Stage 1 — Rogue 2 Opener
1.tip: Briar + Talon immediately opens Rogue 2 — both 1-cost. Very strong synergy early. Weak but OK to take some losses.

2.label: Stage 2 — Build the Board
2.tip: Add Gwen + Fizz for Rogue 3-4. Space Groove + Meeple utility. Keep 50g interest. Do NOT roll for Riven yet.

3.label: Stage 3 — Rolldown
3.tip: 3-1: Level 6. Use saved gold to roll for Riven 2-star. Stop at ~20g remaining. Equip BIS immediately.

4.label: Stage 4 — Add Kai'Sa
4.tip: Level 7 after stabilizing. Find Kai'Sa for Dark Star + Rogue synergy. Rogue 5 is strong. Akali for flex Marauder.

5.label: Stage 5 — Rogue 6 Cap
5.tip: Level 8. Rogue 6 is your end-game. Diana adds Challenger. Akali + Bel'Veth flex for Marauder + Challenger.

name: Meeple 6
desc: Full Meeple board augments every unit's items. Bard 5-cost carry with infinite scaling potential.
godWhy: 6-trait quest reward is easy to hit + emblem from Meeple 7
gameplan: Poppy + Veigar + Meepsie open Meeple 3. Level 8 for Bard. Meeple 7 is insane if you hit it — every item is upgraded.

1.label: Stage 1 — Meeple 3
1.tip: Poppy + Veigar + Meepsie hits Meeple 3 immediately with 3 1-cost/2-cost units. Great early board.

2.label: Stage 2 — Expand Meeple
2.tip: Add Gnar + Fizz for Meeple 5. Level 5 board is very healthy. Economy focus — stay at 50g.

3.label: Stage 3 — Level Push
3.tip: Level to 6. Add Corki for Meeple 6 + Fateweaver. The Meeple 6 augment activates. You have 6 items buffed.

4.label: Stage 4 — Rammus + Bard
4.tip: Level 7-8. Add Rammus for Meeple 7 + Bastion 2. Roll for Bard when at 8. Bard with 3 items is enormous.

5.label: Stage 5 — Meeple 10?
5.tip: Level 9 for Meeple 8+ dream board. Lulu adds Stargazer + Replicator flex. Bard carries harder every round.

name: Stargazer Stack
desc: Stack Stargazer for compounding power. Nunu 4-cost vanguard-carry that becomes unkillable.
godWhy: Wind Hex 30% AS directly empowers Stargazer passive scaling
gameplan: Talon + TF open Stargazer 2. Jax at 3 for Stargazer 3. Roll level 6-7 for Nunu 2-star. Cap Lulu 2 + Kindred.

1.label: Stage 1 — Stargazer 2
1.tip: Talon + Twisted Fate = Stargazer 2 + Rogue 1 + Fateweaver 1. Good early. Save gold.

2.label: Stage 2 — Stargazer 3
2.tip: Add Jax for Stargazer 3. Jax also gives Bastion. Board is decent midgame. 50g interest cap.

3.label: Stage 3 — Roll for Nunu
3.tip: Level 6. Roll for Nunu 2-star and Lulu 2-star. Stargazer 4 is strong — each fight gets better.

4.label: Stage 4 — Stargazer 5
4.tip: Level 7. Add Aatrox for Bastion 2. Stargazer 5 with Nunu cap — units stack massive stats over time.

5.label: Stage 5 — Stargazer 6 Cap
5.tip: Level 8. Kindred gives N.O.V.A. + Challenger. Stargazer 6 is end-game. Nunu is unkillable.

name: Space Groove 6
desc: Full Space Groove board — every unit gets buffed with dancing partner bonuses. Blitzcrank is the hook machine.
godWhy: HP stacking synergizes perfectly with bulky frontline — every unit gets HP every fight
gameplan: Nasus + Teemo Space Groove 2 to start. Gwen at 3 for Groove 3. Level 8 for Blitzcrank. Roll for Nami + Ornn.

1.label: Stage 1 — Groove 2
1.tip: Nasus + Teemo = Space Groove 2 + Vanguard 1 + Shepherd 1. Simple but effective opener.

2.label: Stage 2 — Groove 3
2.tip: Add Gwen for Space Groove 3. Space Groove 3 gives a buffed dancing partner effect. Also Rogue 1 bonus.

3.label: Stage 3 — Expand
3.tip: Add Samira + Ornn for Groove 5 + Bastion 2 + Sniper 2. Level 6 board is solid. Keep 50g.

4.label: Stage 4 — Level 8, Find Blitz
4.tip: Level 7-8. Roll for Nami + Blitzcrank. Groove 7 with Blitzcrank is the power spike. Nami adds Replicator.

5.label: Stage 5 — Groove 10 Dream
5.tip: Level 9. 7 Space Groove units on board. Every unit gets huge bonuses. Add Leona for Vanguard 2.

name: Sniper Backline
desc: Spread your board to maximize Sniper damage bonus. Jhin shreds from the corner with unlimited range.
godWhy: Random loot can snowball early — dice gods willing
gameplan: Ezreal + Gnar Sniper 2 opener. Samira 2-star at level 6. Level 8 for Jhin. Spread units far apart for max Sniper damage.

1.label: Stage 1 — Sniper 2
1.tip: Ezreal + Gnar = Sniper 2. Ezreal also gives Timebreaker. Gnar gives Meeple. Decent early board.

2.label: Stage 2 — Add Samira
2.tip: Samira adds Sniper 3 + Space Groove. Target Samira 2-star eventually for midgame stability.

3.label: Stage 3 — Slow Roll Samira
3.tip: Level 5-6. Slow roll for Samira 2-star. Add Caitlyn for N.O.V.A. flex. Watch your positioning.

4.label: Stage 4 — Level 8
4.tip: Level 8 and find Jhin. Equip all 3 items immediately. Place Jhin in far corner for max Sniper range bonus.

5.label: Stage 5 — Cap It
5.tip: Level 9. Add Corki for Meeple + Fateweaver utility. Spread units to maximize Sniper damage bonus.

name: Vanguard Control
desc: Vanguard shield wall controls fight positioning. Blitzcrank is the teamfight centerpiece hook machine.
godWhy: Tank boards benefit massively from HP scaling — Soraka is the best god pick for this
gameplan: Leona + Nasus Vanguard 2 + Arbiter early. Add Illaoi for Vanguard 3. Roll 7 for Nunu. Level 8 for Blitzcrank.

1.label: Stage 1 — Vanguard 2
1.tip: Leona + Nasus = Vanguard 2 + Arbiter 1. Very tanky opener. Both 1-cost so cheap to 2-star.

2.label: Stage 2 — Add Illaoi
2.tip: Illaoi gives Vanguard 3 + Anima + Shepherd. Poppy adds Bastion 2 + Meeple. Very tanky 4-unit board.

3.label: Stage 3 — Expand Frontline
3.tip: Add Ornn for Bastion 2 + Space Groove + Vanguard 3. Level 6. Stay at 50g interest cap.

4.label: Stage 4 — Level 7, Nunu
4.tip: Level 7 and find Nunu. Vanguard 4 + Stargazer is very tanky. Roll for Nunu 2-star.

5.label: Stage 5 — Blitzcrank Cap
5.tip: Level 8-9. Add Blitzcrank for Vanguard 6 + Space Groove + Party Animal. Shen for Bastion 6 cap.

name: Psionic Carry
desc: Psionic units deal bonus magic damage through their shields. Master Yi is the blade that cuts through everything.
godWhy: Anomaly item on Master Yi is devastating — scales with both AD and AP
gameplan: Gragas + Pyke Psionic 2 + Voyager 2 early. Viktor at 5. Level 7 for Master Yi. Sona at 9 for Psionic 4.

1.label: Stage 1 — Psionic 2
1.tip: Gragas + Pyke = Psionic 2 + Brawler 1 + Voyager 1. Decent opener. Two 2-cost units so slightly weaker early.

2.label: Stage 2 — Viktor Online
2.tip: Add Viktor for Psionic 3 + Channeler. Level 5 with Psionic 3 is strong. Put AP components on Viktor.

3.label: Stage 3 — Keep Econ
3.tip: Add Zoe for Channeler 2 + Arbiter. Psionic 3 + Channeler 2 + Voyager 2. Level 6. 50g interest.

4.label: Stage 4 — Master Yi
4.tip: Level 7. Find Master Yi. Psionic 4 activates — all Psionic units gain attack damage and AP from shields.

5.label: Stage 5 — Sona Cap
5.tip: Level 9. Sona = Psionic 5 + Channeler + Shepherd + Commander. Add Aurelion Sol as second AP carry.

name: Challenger Hyper
desc: Hyperroll for Challenger 2-stars before everyone else stabilizes. Bel'Veth 2-star attacks infinitely fast.
godWhy: Lose streak gold funds the hyperroll — essential for this strategy
gameplan: Hyper roll at level 4 for Bel'Veth + Jinx 2-stars. Then natural roll for Diana + Kindred. Challenger 4 by mid-game.

1.label: Stage 1 — Buy Everything
1.tip: Buy every Bel'Veth and Jinx you see. Spend gold! You want 2-stars ASAP. Also grab Talon for Rogue.

2.label: Stage 2 — Hyperroll to 0
2.tip: 2-1: If you have 30g+, hyperroll to find Bel'Veth 2 + Jinx 2. Challenger 2 is your core. Add Akali for N.O.V.A.

3.label: Stage 3 — Diana Arrives
3.tip: Natural roll to level 6. Find Diana for Challenger 3 + Arbiter. Much more stable board mid-game.

4.label: Stage 4 — Kindred Cap
4.tip: Level 7 for Kindred. Challenger 4 activates — massive attack speed for all challengers. This is your win condition.

5.label: Stage 5 — All Challengers
5.tip: Level 8. Add flex units. Challenger 5 if you hit everyone. Bel'Veth attacks unlimited times with Rageblade stacks.

name: Arbiter Control
desc: Arbiters impose laws each round. LeBlanc 4-cost is a slippery AP carry that duplicates her damage.
godWhy: AP per level scales perfectly with LeBlanc double-cast damage
gameplan: Leona + Zoe Arbiter 2 opener. Diana at level 5 for Arbiter 3. Level 8 for LeBlanc. Arbiter 2 law doubles a passive.

1.label: Stage 1 — Arbiter 2
1.tip: Leona + Zoe = Arbiter 2 + Vanguard 1 + Channeler 1. Law effect activates — add bonus effect to arbitrary trait.

2.label: Stage 2 — Expand
2.tip: Diana for Arbiter 3 + Challenger. Aatrox for N.O.V.A. + Bastion. Level 5 board is strong.

3.label: Stage 3 — Keep Econ
3.tip: Add Poppy for Meeple + Bastion 2. Level 6. 50g interest. AP items on Zoe as placeholder for LeBlanc.

4.label: Stage 4 — LeBlanc Online
4.tip: Level 7-8. Find LeBlanc and transfer AP items. Arbiter 3 + Shepherd law gives LeBlanc absurd buffs.

5.label: Stage 5 — Full Law Board
5.tip: Level 9. Kindred for N.O.V.A. + Challenger. Full law board with Arbiter 3 + two laws active.

name: Replicator Clone
desc: Replicators create clone copies of themselves. Nami's clones deal full damage. Overwhelming numbers.
godWhy: Dice god can give you early Replicator snowball loot
gameplan: Lissandra + Veigar Replicator 2 opener (Dark Star 2 bonus too!). Add Pantheon for 3. Roll 6 for Lulu + Nami. Clone army.

1.label: Stage 1 — Replicator 2
1.tip: Lissandra + Veigar = Replicator 2 AND Dark Star 2 + Shepherd 1 + Meeple 1. Great opener with two synergies.

2.label: Stage 2 — Replicator 3
2.tip: Pantheon for Replicator 3. Pantheon also gives Timebreaker + Brawler. Level 5. Save gold.

3.label: Stage 3 — Roll for 2-Stars
3.tip: Level 6. Slow roll for Lissandra + Veigar 2-stars. Lulu added for Stargazer + Replicator 4.

4.label: Stage 4 — Nami Cap
4.tip: Level 7-8. Nami for Replicator 4 + Space Groove. Replicator 4 makes 2 copies. Nami clones + Lissandra clones.

5.label: Stage 5 — Clone Army
5.tip: Level 9. Corki for Meeple + Fateweaver utility. Add Poppy for Bastion 2 cap. 6 Replicator if you're fed.

name: Marauder Hyper
desc: Marauders gain permanent AD every kill. Master Yi 2-star with a snowballing army of killers.
godWhy: Lose streak gold to slow roll Master Yi 2 at level 7
gameplan: Akali + Bel'Veth Marauder 2 + Challenger early. Add Urgot at 5. Slow roll level 7 for Master Yi 2-star. Fiora cap at 9.

1.label: Stage 1 — Marauder 2
1.tip: Akali + Bel'Veth = Marauder 2 + N.O.V.A. 1 + Challenger 1 + Primordian 1. Lots of synergy activation at 2 units.

2.label: Stage 2 — Build Board
2.tip: Urgot for Marauder 3 + Mecha + Brawler. Briar for Anima + Primordian 2 (healing frontline). Level 5.

3.label: Stage 3 — Keep Econ
3.tip: Diana for Challenger 2 + Arbiter. Level 6. Marauder 4 is very strong — all Marauders stack AD per kill.

4.label: Stage 4 — Master Yi
4.tip: Level 7 slow roll. Find Master Yi 2-star. Marauder 4 + Psionic synergy. Yi with 3 items is devastating.

5.label: Stage 5 — Fiora Cap
5.tip: Level 8-9. Fiora adds Marauder 6 + Anima + Divine Duelist. Kindred for Challenger. Full Marauder army stacks to infinity.
